sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72844" key="o)kta/tropos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτά-τροπος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n72844.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the first eight</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τόποι</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δωδεκάτροπος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:334:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">334.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
